member.name: T:TokenId
member.summary:
Constructs a TokenId.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:TokenId.#ctor(System.Int64)_3
member.param:
the Num part
Constructor that uses Shard, Realm and Num should be used instead as Shard and Realm should not assume 0 value

member.name: M:TokenId.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Create a token id from a string.

member.name: M:TokenId.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a token id from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TokenId.FromProtobuf(Proto.TokenID)
member.summary: Create a token id from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenId.FromSolidityAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve the token id from a solidity address.
member.remarks: @deprecatedThis method is deprecated. Use {@link #fromEvmAddress(long, long, String)} instead.

member.name: M:TokenId.FromEvmAddress(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Constructs a TokenID from Shard, Realm, and EVM address. The EVM address must be a "long zero address" (first 12 bytes are zero).
member.param: the EVM address as a hex string
member.exception: if the EVM address is not a valid long zero address

member.name: M:TokenId.ToEvmAddress
member.summary: Converts this TokenId to an EVM address string. Creates a solidity address using Shard=0, Realm=0, and the file Number.
member.returns: the EVM address as a hex string

member.name: M:TokenId.ToSolidityAddress
member.returns: the solidity address as a string

member.name: M:TokenId.Validate(Client)
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:TokenId.ValidateChecksum(Client)
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:TokenId.ToStringWithChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Create a string representation with Checksum.
